title: praxelis conoclinanthia
intro: Praxelis conoclinanthia, also known as the Praxelis or Brushland Praxelis, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. The medicinal properties of Praxelis conoclinanthia include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. This plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Praxelis conoclinanthia can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine.
